title: Jar Gripper Multi Purpose Reusable Rubber Gripper Jar Opener Gripper Rubber Jar Multi Purpose Bottle Lid Openers Fit for Most Bottles Set of 3
description:
About this item
【OPEN STUBBORN JARS OF ALL SIZES】These 3 durable rubber jar grips in 3 different shapes & colors provide superior grip when opening stubborn jars & containers of all sizes, from large to small
【MATERIAL】 Made of solid rubber,resistant to twist; dishwasher safe, easy for you to clean up the grease, oil, or stains on the pad surface
【OPEN MANY DIFFERENT JARS】The teal square & green round flat grip openers are for use with large jars. The red cone-shaped ribbed grip will help you open a variety of smaller bottles and jars
【GREAT FOR WEAK HANDS】Rubber jar gripper openers work great for children, women,seniors, they provide independence, Whether you're struggling with arthritis trying to open a jar of jelly or a mechanic struggling with a stuck valve, the quality rubber jar opener simply works
【A GOOD HOME HELPER】 These rubber jar grippers not only can be used as botte openner but also can work as round kitchen coasters, anti-scald pads or anything stucked that needs great friction, also great for wrapping hot handle/lids on the stovetop
reviews_5s:
These are an excellent value, very durable and work great!
There are different sizes, they grip well and really ease opening.
Extremely durable!But from the one I used; it worked well to open a bottle with a screw top.
I can update on the one with the cone shape. I purchased after seeing someone on YouTube use it to open a flip top bottle of Kombucha. I used this to open a bottle of water Kefir after I placed it in a bowl, and it worked wonderfully. No more fizzy drinks or fruit all over the kitchen. Very happy although unhappy that I had to pay for all three when I only needed one.I knew there would come a day when I could not open a jar and that day has finally arrived so I ordered these and they work like magic. I highly recommend them to anyone having trouble opening stuff!They work to open jars, fast shipping, good quality and better priced than in stores. Helps especially for older individuals with arthritic hands.The oval rounded gripper is awesome. I use it frequently and it helps with just about everything. I use the flat ones for other things and for very small things. I wish they sold the red oval grippers separately. I would recommend this though to anybody.I love this gripper kit to help with opening bottles or jars. My hands don’t work as well and this was just what I needed. I even purchased another set for my neighbor as well!Just what I ordered. Great service, good quality.The set is a nice variety of rubber grips that are used to open those difficult jar lids.I got these for my seventy eight year old brother and he loves them to death.I tried to even steal one from him and he wouldn't let me lol.I highly recommend them.Great grippers for opening
reviews_1s: The two round ones are SO cheap! The funnel shaped one is difficult to use and I cannot figure out what it is even used for.These pads have the thickness and flimsiness of a thin paper towel, and will easily shred. They are also very small. I don't think you would find anything of such low quality even in the Dollar Tree. I am returning the product.received 2 pieces of cheap vinyl and 1 bottle cap type gripper. the cap gripper was a good product, heavy rubber but the 2 other pieces were NOT, very thin. Do not buy, just another rip off.I have arthritis and I could not even use it to open a jar and that’s what I bought them for to open the items I have or for the things I already have. So I returned them.Very thin rubber and so small that it barely grips the wide mouth mason jar. The cone thing didn't work at all.Very thin. Do not loosen lids -- I cannot tell what the red conical one is supposed to for. Very inexpensive, but would not order again.They are very thin hard to grip very unusablePaper thin and cheap. Not worth bothering to return. Just chucking in garbageSmall, thin, and cheaply made. These are not like the old ones you could buy at the retail stores. These are useless. They are so small and thin. I'd pay double for double the thickness so they actually worked.They fell apart ..left rubber[when they got wet] streaks on my countertop and they won’t come off ..But the red one didn’t do that - they also didn't really help with opening jars..way to flimsy
